title: momentum for Automobility
description: A fully configurable add-on for Automobilty to improve the mod’s movement logic. Makes the driving experience more immersive while still keeping it vanilla!
body:
# momentum for Automobility A fully configurable add-on for [Automobility](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility) to improve the mod’s movement logic. Makes the driving experience more immersive while still keeping it vanilla! Still in BETA. ## Features - **Speed**: increase the speed cap. Cars now can run at 130 kms/hr! - **Acceleration**: adjustable acceleration curve - **Coasting**: cars retain momentum for longer when releasing accelerator - **Steering**: steering is harder at higher speeds. To take sharp curves you’ll have to brake or drift - **Braking**: progressive and softer brakes - **Drifting**: choose between 3 profiles - *Automobility’s Vanilla Drift* - *Arcade Drift*: quick sideslip (precise and easy) - *Responsive Drift*: deep sideslip (steering based) - **Camera**: fixed jaw, responsive on brake, steering and drifts - **HUD**: added minimal looking velocimeter All parameters can be tweaked and/or toggled via the config file or the options menu (if ModMenu and YACL are available)

Cruise at higher speeds!

Progressive braking

Responsive drifting

Camera effects

Configurable interface
